justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all temporal expressions, including "after-tomorrow at 10h", "Wednesday afternoon, say around 2 PM", "early next week then? Monday morning, around 9:30 AM?", and "earliest you have anything available for an investing call, any day, any time, in the next two weeks?".
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently proposed alternative times when the requested slots were unavailable, although it could have offered a wider range of options in some turns.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent was mostly efficient, but it could have offered more alternative slots in the initial responses to reduce the number of turns.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was generally positive, with the agent maintaining a professional tone and successfully booking an appointment, despite the multiple turns required to find an available slot.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent recovered well after each rejection, maintaining context and expanding its search as requested by the user, although it could have been more proactive in offering a wider range of alternatives to expedite the process.
